x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Authoritative source coverage confirms that CI data originates from trusted automated discovery. Now Assist gives higher confidence to discovery-sourced CIs when generating AI recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Replace manually-sourced CIs with discovery-sourced records by expanding ServiceNow Discovery, SCCM integration, or ServiceGraph Connectors. Target: 90%+ of active CIs with an authoritative discovery source.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c62
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Authoritative source coverage confirms that CI data originates from trusted automated discovery. Now Assist gives higher confidence to discovery-sourced CIs when generating AI recommendations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Authoritative Source Coverage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaAuth = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaAuth.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaAuth.addQuery('discovery_source', '!=', '');
    gaAuth.addQuery('discovery_source', 'NOT IN', 'manual,Manual,Manual Entry');
    gaAuth.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaAuth.query();
    var authoritative = gaAuth.next() ? parseInt(gaAuth.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. Authoritative source coverage cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((authoritative / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active CIs have an authoritative discovery source (' + authoritative + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 90) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active CIs are discovery-sourced. Now Assist AI recommendations are based on reliably maintained, auto-discovered CI data.' };
    } else if (pct >= 70) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CIs have an authoritative source (target: 90%+). Manually entered CIs become stale quickly and reduce Now Assist context reliability.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CIs are from authoritative sources. High manual CI rate means Now Assist is reasoning over data that is likely stale and unreliable.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CMDB</module>
<number>CHK0006006</number>
<order>90</order>
<remediation_guidance>Replace manually-sourced CIs with discovery-sourced records by expanding ServiceNow Discovery, SCCM integration, or ServiceGraph Connectors. Target: 90%+ of active CIs with an authoritative discovery source.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c62</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
